svg.text: See the inside of every candle: the battle between buyers and sellers

g.text: Net direction of aggression at each level
When aggressive orders are absorbed by passive institutional orders
Aggressive selling absorbed by passive buyers
Aggressive buying absorbed by passive sellers
Probe into key level, instant reversal
Quantified Scoring: 70+ = Strong signal (up to 1.5x size)
Score factors: Volume intensity, Delta strength, Compression, Level confluence, Wick/Sweep bonus
Bid left | Ask right at each level
A single 5-minute NQ bar that looks ordinary on a candlestick chart
can reveal a concentrated institutional buying program in footprint form.
Footprint shows the "why" behind price movement. Standard charts only show the "what".
Best RTH windows: 9:30-11:30 AM (opening) • 1:00-2:30 PM (afternoon trend) • 3:00-4:00 PM (closing)
